Package component.modifier.combinator

Class Duplicator

java.lang.Object
component.modifier.Modifier
component.modifier.combinator.Combinator
component.modifier.combinator.Duplicator
All Implemented Interfaces:
Tippable, GridIndexable
public class Duplicator extends Combinator
The Duplicator class is a stateful Combinator that creates an exact copy of a Card.

The duplication process operates in two steps:

  1. Scanning: When a card enters, the modifier creates a deep copy of the card (preserving suit, value, and material) and stores it in a buffer.
  2. Spawning: On a subsequent logic tick or interaction, the modifier attempts to place the cloned card onto the board at its current location.

  • Constructor Details

    • Duplicator

      public Duplicator()

  • Method Details

    • modify

      public void modify(Card toModify)
      Executes the duplication logic.

      If the buffer is empty, it scans the incoming card. If the buffer is full, it attempts to deploy the clone via GameLevel.addCard(component.card.Card, util.GridPos). Standard immunities (Corrupted, Glass, and Stone) are checked before processing.

      Specified by:
      modify in class Modifier
      Parameters:
      toModify - The card triggering the modification tile.

    • isBlocking

      public boolean isBlocking()
      Determines if this tile is impassable.
      Returns:
      true if a clone is currently stored in the buffer, preventing other cards from entering until the clone is spawned.

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Resets the modifier, re-enabling it and deleting any unspawned clones.
      Overrides:
      reset in class Combinator

    • getTooltip

      public Tooltip getTooltip()
      Generates a tooltip that dynamically reflects the Duplicator's state.

      If a clone is ready to be spawned, the tooltip identifies the card currently held in the "printing" buffer.

      Specified by:
      getTooltip in interface Tippable
      Overrides:
      getTooltip in class Combinator
      Returns:
      A Tooltip with the status and identity of the stored clone.
